title: gnaphalium bellidioides
intro: Gnaphalium bellidioides, also known as the daisy bush or cleft cudweed, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Australia and New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe and protect wounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. Gnaphalium bellidioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for natural health and wellness.
